## 📝 Description
This Pull Request introduces essential PR hygiene tools to the repository. It includes a standardized PR template and a self-review checklist to ensure high-quality code contributions.

**What changed?**
- Created `.github/pull_request_template.md` for better PR descriptions.
- Created `docs/pr-checklist.md` for consistent self-reviews.
- Updated `README.md` with a "How to run" section.

## ✅ Checklist
- [x] I have followed the self-review checklist.
- [x] All required files are in their correct directories.
